title: OPERATION REBUILD HOPE VETERAN TRANSITIONAL HOUSING - 211info
text: BRYAN'S HOME OPERATION REBUILD HOPE VETERAN TRANSITIONAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and wrap around services by offering clean, sober, and safe living facilities. 1520 Sherman Avenue North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Must be eligible for Veterans Affairs Grant Per Diem (VA-GPD) and pass a criminal background check (no violent criminal history). Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-3pm (541) 808-3266 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 808-9025 Administration Headquarter Office (541) 808-3266 Main Phone Bryan's Home Peer Support Desk Bryan's Home Peer Support (541) 808-3266 Administration (541) 808-9025 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-3pm Services: Case/Care Management * Veterans Peer Mental Health Support Services * Veterans Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRYAN'S HOME
